key_insight: A fully transparent, ablation-driven post-training pipeline can materially improve both instruction-following and reasoning for an 8B LLM, with distinct optimization paths for general and reasoning-specialized models.
engineering_relevance: The paper offers a reproducible recipe for data curation, filtering, and staged SFT/RL that can guide lightweight LLM deployment and post-training optimization.
method: Curate 3.84M SFT samples and a 200K verifiable RL candidate pool
Apply response distillation, cross-verification filtering, difficulty grading, task classification, and diversity-aware sampling
Train separate branches with three-stage SFT, GRPO RL, and OPD/MOPD teacher-based optimization
evidence_signal: On Qwen3-8B-base, NebulaExp-Ins-SFT raises average benchmark score from 55.01 to 60.99, then GRPO reaches 61.85; the reasoning branch improves from 73.88 to 75.17, and MOPD uses only 10K samples for +4.18 average gain.
watch_item: Results are tied to an 8B Qwen3-based setup and may not transfer directly to other model sizes, domains, or verifier availability constraints.
paper_title: NebulaExp-8B: An Empirical Post-Training Pipeline via Full-Scale Ablation Research
